name: Pingidentity Group Memberships With Missing Users
description: Detects orphaned pingidentity group memberships referencing users that no longer exist.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM pingidentity_group_memberships m LEFT JOIN pingidentity_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.user_id IS NOT NULL AND u.id IS NULL
remediation: Remove orphaned memberships and reconcile group assignments from authoritative identity sources.
